prompt: Generate a dark pixel art screenshot demonstrating new game assets for a dungeon crawler. Include a character sprite, unique monster asset, environment tiles, and UI elements, similar to the reference image's style and composition.
prompt_refined:
Generate a dark pixel art screenshot for a dungeon crawler game, showcasing new game assets while strictly adhering to the overall style and top-down isometric composition of image 1.

Position a new, distinct character sprite in the left-center foreground, holding a weapon. In the deep background, prominently feature a unique, menacing monster asset, visually different from the statue in image 1 but occupying a similar central, imposing position. Design new environment tiles for the dungeon walls and floor, maintaining the gritty, stone-and-tile aesthetic seen in image 1, illuminated by new scattered light sources like candles or glowing runestones.

Integrate a complete set of UI elements: a character portrait and health bar in the top-left, a detailed mini-map in the top-center, a weapon display and resource bar in the top-right, and an inventory/action bar populated with new item icons along the bottom-center. All UI elements must strictly follow the pixel art style and precise layout of image 1.
objects: New, distinct character sprite in the left-center foreground
Unique, menacing monster in the deep background (central, imposing position)
New dungeon environment tiles (walls and floor, gritty stone-and-tile aesthetic)
Scattered light sources (candles or glowing runestones)
Character portrait and health bar in the top-left
Weapon display and resource bar in the top-right
Inventory/action bar along the bottom-center populated with new item icons
Statue from image 1 (should not be present)
